name: Mo · MassJedi — Portfolio
tagline: Personal brand site (one mind, many lives).
nextAction: Added a public-safe 'Shiraz House · خانهٔ هنر — Archive' coming-soon SECTION (#arthive): a respectful intro to the documented cultural history (cinema nights, art & exhibitions, music evenings) framed strictly as CULTURAL MEMORY — no ownership claims, no contested facts, no copyrighted images (placeholder/coming-soon gallery only). 14 new data-i18n keys (arc.* + menu.arthive) with full FA+DE translations; menu link added; CSS for striped placeholder gallery; bumped style.css?v=11 + i18n.js?v=12. VERIFIED live in EN/FA/DE — every arc.* key resolves (0 untranslated), RTL flips in FA, 0 console errors. Next: (a) fill the archive + Daricheh with real original/freely-shareable pieces and cleared images; (b) add real facts/photos/press links via _private/FILL-ME-facts.md; (c) add a real portrait.jpg and finish deploy.

subphases.title: Single-page site scaffold (HTML/CSS/JS, no build step)
Core sections written (Hero, About, Research, Work, Toolkit, Channels, Contact)
Design system in css/style.css (dark cinematic theme)
Interactions in js/main.js (canvas field, cursor, scroll-reveal)
README + LICENSE + .gitignore present
Email wired in Contact + Email channel
Drop-in folders for art / cats / portrait images
Add real portrait.jpg (currently monogram fallback)
Replace is-soon placeholder channels with real links (YouTube, LinkedIn, Instagram, X)
Export og.svg to 1200×630 PNG for share previews
GitHub Pages workflow (.github/workflows/static.yml) + .nojekyll
Push to GitHub and enable Pages source
Set live URL + og:url to deployed address
Verify live render on desktop + mobile
CellSight demo bundled under projects/cellsight
Wire CellSight demo into the Work section
Accessibility & performance pass (Lighthouse)
Final copy review across all sections
FA/EN/DE i18n engine (reload-based switch, RTL-safe, strips per-char split for Persian)
Art-life sections: Shiraz Art House, Cinema, Music & Quran, Collaborators, Press, Values
Language switch in nav (EN/FA/DE) + Vazirmatn + right-to-left styles
Wikipedia drafts EN/FA/DE + honest how-to (private, in _private/, gitignored)
Verified in preview: English renders, no console errors, Persian flips to RTL + translates
i18n parity verified: every data-i18n key resolves in FA + DE (0 missing keys), confirmed live in preview across EN/FA/DE incl. Research/Papers, Engineer lead, Music caption
Translations / Daricheh (داریچه) section stub added — FA/EN/DE strings, no copyrighted text, menu link + pill styling; verified rendering in all 3 languages

Shiraz House · خانهٔ هنر — Archive (coming-soon) section added (#arthive) — cultural-history intro (cinema nights, art & music) as CULTURAL MEMORY only, no ownership claims / no contested facts / no copyrighted images (striped placeholder gallery); 14 arc.* + menu.arthive keys in FA/EN/DE, menu link, CSS; verified live in EN/FA/DE with 0 untranslated keys, RTL-safe, 0 console errors; ?v= bumped (style.css 11, i18n.js 12)
Add real facts, photos, and press/interview source links (_private/FILL-ME-facts.md)

Translate remaining narrative sections (athlete/manager/poet/personal + engineer header + worlds facets) — data-i18n keys added & FA/DE strings written; verified rendering in all 3 languages with 0 missing keys and no console errors; leaked editor-note placeholders removed from public copy
Fill Daricheh with real original/freely-shareable translation pieces (currently coming-soon stub only)
Approve + push to GitHub Pages; later submit Wikipedia via AfC once independent sources exist

strengths: Zero-build static site, deploys straight to GitHub Pages
Distinct dark cinematic design with rich motion
Public-safe by design — no private/sensitive content
weaknesses: Not yet deployed live; placeholder URLs
Missing real portrait and several social links
opportunities: Strong personal brand for research/career visibility
Bundled CellSight demo can showcase real work
Rename to USERNAME.github.io for a clean root URL
threats: Stale placeholders erode credibility if left public
Motion-heavy UX may hurt low-end/perf or accessibility

decisions.decision: Add FA/EN/DE + full art-life identity; keep public tone humane/universal; Wikipedia only via Articles-for-Creation once independent sources exist. Auto-sync pushed it live before review, so the unverified 'Kiarostami award' line was removed as a precaution until the user confirms it.
decisions.why: User wants a Wikipedia presence + clean multilingual site across his many lives (Shiraz Art House, cinema, music/Quran, Neda Aryana). A self-written Wikipedia page gets deleted; an unverified award claim on a live public page could harm him, so under-claiming is safer until facts arrive.
rejected: Publish a self-written Wikipedia page now
Full open political voice on the public site
Assert the Kiarostami award without confirmation

decisions.decision: Rebuild as a multi-hyphenate personal-brand site (v2)
decisions.why: One mind, many lives — reflect the full range of work, not a single niche

decisions.decision: Plain HTML/CSS/vanilla JS with no build step
decisions.why: Deploy straight to GitHub Pages, zero install/maintenance overhead
